business_question: Which days of the week generate the highest sales volume?
business_context: Store managers use this information to optimize staffing and inventory availability.
sql_answer:
SELECT
d.DAY_NAME,
SUM(s.UNITS_SOLD) AS TOTAL_UNITS
FROM FACT_SALES s
JOIN DIM_DATE d
ON s.DATE_KEY = d.DATE_KEY
GROUP BY d.DAY_NAME
ORDER BY TOTAL_UNITS DESC;
